sound_type: deep resonant roar -- 50-400 Hz, infrasound below 20 Hz, 100+ dB, 2-8 seconds. E=8. THIRD E=8 IN ENGINE.
ecosystem: Remote wilderness. Alpine meadows, subalpine forest, river corridors. Apex land predator.
season: Year-round resident. Roar peaks during breeding season and territorial disputes.

coordinates.description: Grizzly Bear in North Cascades. Critically endangered. Fewer than 10.

taxonomy_note.description: Ursidae returns. E=8 -- THIRD E=8. Grizzly roar. Apex land predator. Largest terrestrial animal in PNW.
taxonomy_note.family_count_in_engine: Ursidae: Black Bear Huff (200, E=5), Jaw-Pop (201, E=6), Cub Distress (202, E=5), Grizzly Roar (217, E=8).
taxonomy_note.name_etymology: Ursus arctos horribilis = 'horrible bear bear'. horribilis from Latin 'dreadful'.
taxonomy_note.class_note: Class Mammalia. 180-360 kg. Largest PNW land predator. Keystone species.

song_metrics.amplitude: E=8. 100+ dB at 10 meters. ABSOLUTE MAXIMUM.
song_metrics.context: Dominance display, territorial defense, confrontation escalation.
song_metrics.key_property: GRIZZLY BEAR ROAR. E=8. THIRD E=8. Apex land predator. v1.49.358.

physical_description.overall: 180-360 kg (males). Standing height 2.4 m. Shoulder hump. Concave face profile.
physical_description.diagnostic_mark: Large shoulder hump. Concave face. Long front claws. Much larger than black bear.
physical_description.field_id: Massive brown bear with shoulder hump. If encountered: do not run. Make yourself known. Back away slowly. Bear spray.

nodes.title: E=8 Apex Roar -- Third Maximum
nodes.description: Third E=8 in engine. 50-400 Hz, 100+ dB, infrasound. Most powerful terrestrial vocalization in PNW.

nodes.title: Apex Land Predator -- Keystone Species
nodes.description: 180-360 kg. Ecosystem engineer. Soil disturbance, salmon fertilization, wildlife corridors.

nodes.title: North Cascades Recovery -- Critical Conservation
nodes.description: Fewer than 10 in WA. Federal recovery. One of most endangered populations in lower 48.

cross_references.relationship: URSIDAE SCALE! E=5 vs. E=8. 25K+ vs. <10. Different league.
TWO E=8! Scream cuts (high). Roar fills (low). Same max, opposite spectra.
GRIZZLY PAIR! Roar (E=8) + jaw-pop (E=7). Combined E=15.
POWER BEHIND VOICE! E=14 pair total. Stage voice + wilderness voice.
